title: Saddle Recipe Backport
description: Saddle Recipe backported from 1.21.6 to older versions
body:
# Saddle Recipe Backport

Backports the **new saddle crafting recipe from Minecraft 1.21.6** to older versions, where saddles were previously uncraftable in survival.

## Features:

- Adds the new **saddle recipe** from Minecraft 1.21.6

- Craft **1 Saddle** using **3× Leather** and **1× Iron Ingot**

![Saddle Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e98ba3cfd88a098fcc8b3870f404df1cf71ac393.png)

## Compatibility:

- **Mod**: **Minecraft 1.20.1 - 1.21.5**

- **Datapack**: **Minecraft 1.20.1 - 1.21.5**

- No dependencies needed
